programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon, the Accident Man, is a stone cold killer, he is the best at what he does. But when a loved one is dragged into the London underworld and murdered by his own crew, Fallon is forced to rip apart the life he knew in order to avenge the one person who actually meant something to him.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: Suspect (1987)
programme.desc: This tension-filled courtroom drama opens with the suicide of a Supreme Court justice. Then the young Justice Department employee to whom he had given privileged information is discovered dead. A deaf-mute Vietnam veteran is charged with her murder and Cher, a public defender, is appointed counsel.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in an ancient web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Robert Langdon follows clues to stop a virus that would wipe out half the world's population.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: When successful financial advisor Derek Charles (Idris Elba) settles into a new Los Angeles neighborhood with his loving wife Sharon (Beyonce Knowles) and young son Kyle, everything seems perfect. But when a beautiful temp, Lisa (Ali Larter), joins the firm, Derek's life takes a strange turn. After a misunderstood encounter at the company holiday party, Lisa begins to spiral out of control - putting Derek's career in jeopardy and Sharon's marriage and life on the line.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: Miss Bala (2019)
programme.desc: A beauty contest winner is forced to work for a crime boss after she witnesses a murder. Remake of the 2011 film.

programme.title: Ladder 49
programme.desc: Trapped in a fire that looks likely to kill him, a fireman takes the opportunity to look back over his life, career and marriage, while he waits for his company,Ladder 49, to rescue him, if they can.

programme.title: Gloria (1980)
programme.desc: Rowlands garnered an Oscar nomination for her fierce portrayal as an ex-mob mistress who takes care of a young boy after his family is wiped out by the Mafia. Gloria must rely on all her street-savvy to prevent both herself and the boy from being the mobster's next target.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Deep-sea divers vie with a Haitian drug dealer to recover a trunkload of sunken morphine. Based on Peter Benchley's best-selling novel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Missionary Man
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rolls into town on a unique motorcycle. All he carries is the bible and a desire for justice. Past vengeance collides as Ryder rights an injustice from his past and liberates the small town from a malicious oppressor.

programme.title: Searching (2018)
programme.desc: 37 hours after David Kim's (John Cho) 16-year-old daughter goes missing without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets are kept today: his daughter's laptop.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Uma Thurman star in this futuristic sci-fi thriller about a world where genetic engineering is used to perfect the human species.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rolls into town on a unique motorcycle. All he carries is the bible and a desire for justice. Past vengeance collides as Ryder rights an injustice from his past and liberates the small town from a malicious oppressor.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Still reeling from the revelation that his uncle was a spy for the British Government, Alex is kidnapped and interrogated by an unknown group of paramilitary agents. It will take all his hidden skills to turn the tables on his captors.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Danger closes in on all sides as Rue's double-dealing finally reaches its breaking point; while the medical van speeds towards the border, Maddy and Cassie must band together and Alamo is struck by a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Danger closes in on all sides as Rue's double-dealing finally reaches its breaking point; while the medical van speeds towards the border, Maddy and Cassie must band together and Alamo is struck by a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: Documentary about Hoyt Richards, a 16-year-old that meets an enigmatic Manhattan socialite on a Nantucket beach and is pulled into his spiritual group, Eternal Values.

programme.title: The Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver breaks down who Donald Trump has pardoned since taking office.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Pochettino continues reshaping the USMNT roster as new contributors break through during the 2025 Gold Cup, culminating in a high-stakes showdown against rival Mexico.

programme.title: Bring Me the Beauties
programme.desc: Documentary about Hoyt Richards, a 16-year-old that meets an enigmatic Manhattan socialite on a Nantucket beach and is pulled into his spiritual group, Eternal Values.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Danger closes in on all sides as Rue's double-dealing finally reaches its breaking point; while the medical van speeds towards the border, Maddy and Cassie must band together and Alamo is struck by a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: HD. Guests: Ben McKenzie, Dan Jones, David French. Ends 05/29.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Pochettino continues reshaping the USMNT roster as new contributors break through during the 2025 Gold Cup, culminating in a high-stakes showdown against rival Mexico.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver breaks down who Donald Trump has pardoned since taking office.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 2014; Niall builds a new life, but old ties resurface when Mona reconnects with Ruben, forcing difficult choices.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Marty Supreme
programme.desc: Marty Mauser, a wily hustler with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Danger closes in on all sides as Rue's double-dealing finally reaches its breaking point; while the medical van speeds towards the border, Maddy and Cassie must band together and Alamo is struck by a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Materialists

Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Pochettino continues reshaping the USMNT roster as new contributors break through during the 2025 Gold Cup, culminating in a high-stakes showdown against rival Mexico.

Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.desc: A limited series about a love triangle between three adults experiencing middle-age malaise that leads to one of them ending up dead.

programme.title: DTF St. Louis
programme.desc: Floyd confronts Clark about the affair; Plumb and Homer uncover new facts about Carol's past.

programme.title: DTF St. Louis

programme.title: DTF St. Louis

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A few years after high school, Rue's debts finally catch up with her; hoping to finance her dream wedding, Cassie tries to become internet famous, to the disapproval of Nate, who's juggling the demands of running Cal's business.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of childhood friends wrestle with the virtue of faith, the possibility of redemption and the problem of evil.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: As subscribers surge, Cassie and Maddy clash when the truth comes to light; Rue realizes she is in far too deep when Alamo grows increasingly suspicious; Jules' relationship teeters on the edge, and Lexi discovers her sister is once again threatening to invade her territory.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

programme.title: Norm of the North
programme.desc: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

programme.title: Larry Kramer in Love and Anger
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jean Carlomusto examines the life of Larry Kramer, playwright, author and activist for gay rights.

programme.title: Breslin and Hamill: Deadline Artists
programme.desc: The lives and careers of journalists Jimmy Breslin and Pete Hamill.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
programme.desc: Victor Frankenstein is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe, with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Frankenstein 1970
programme.desc: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: The Blair Witch Project
programme.desc: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

programme.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
programme.desc: As it follows the twisted path traveled by five people fixated on "The Blair Witch Project," "Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2" journeys into a dark and dangerous place where the line between truth and fiction blurs and perhaps vanishes altogether. Individual perception grows increasingly untrustworthy as the film's protagonists find themselves caught in a vortex of unspeakable evil, the origins of which -- human or supernatural -- remain chillingly uncertain.

programme.title: Blair Witch
programme.desc: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

programme.title: All the Beauty and the Bloodshed
programme.desc: From Academy Award winner Laura Poitras comes an epic, emotional and interconnected story about internationally renowned artist and activist Nan Goldin told through her slideshows, intimate interviews, ground-breaking photography, and rare footage of her personal fight to hold the Sackler family accountable for the opioid crisis. The film interweaves Goldin's past and present, the deeply personal and urgently political, from P.A.I.N.'s (Prescription Addiction Intervention Now) actions.

programme.title: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
programme.desc: Filmmaker Andrew Rossi examines the rising phenomenon of fake news and how it impacts the average citizen in the United States.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: At the age of 81, more than three decades after receiving a lifetime ban for gambling, former Cincinnati Reds star Pete Rose reignites his quest for reinstatement into Major League Baseball while recounting his unlikely rise to the top of the sport.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Charlie Hustle" for dirty work ethic, Pete Rose becomes the face of baseball; Rose helps transform the Cincinnati Reds into the "Big Red Machine," winning back-to-back World Series titles in the '70s.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: Pete Rose becomes the highest paid player in baseball; in 1985 he breaks Ty Cobb's record to become MLB's all-time career hits leader; but a gambling scandal leads to a prison sentence and lifetime banishment from the game he loves.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: After years of denial, in 2004, Pete Rose publicly admits that he bet on the game of baseball; Rose confronts the truth about his public image and makes one last bid for MLB reinstatement and enshrinement in the National Baseball Hall of Fame.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
programme.desc: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: Matt Edmondson writes and narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe - the programme takes viewers on a tour of record-breaking sequences, celebrating the people who have striven to find fame by using their own individual talents to set one of the renowned Guinness World Records. It showcases some of the most incredible and peculiar record-breaking attempts and includes interviews with some of the biggest characters from the world of record-breaking - from the fastest dog on two wheels to the longest fingernails in the US, this fun-packed series reveals some of the most extraordinary humans and amazing animals to be found on Planet Earth and is also jammed with the key facts and statistics for each record attempt and the people involved. In this episode, Matt highlights Japanese skipping dogs, the quickest 100-metre moonwalk, and the dog with the longest tongue in the world.

After news breaks that Jeanine Long has taken her own life, evidence comes to light exonerating her for the murder of 15-year-old Abigail Mantel 11 years earlier. Jeanie had always insisted on her innocence but no-one - including her own family - believed her. Vera sets out to solve the mystery of Abigail's death, and she and her team delve into the secrets and lies of a small community which is still feeling the repercussions of the killing. Vera digs away at the evidence in her efforts to get closer to the truth, but not before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn when another, potentially connected, murder occurs. With a killer on the loose and the pressure building, Vera must use her skill and instinct to expose the lies at the community's heart - and to lay the ghosts of Abigail and Jeanie to rest.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Another investigation for Colin Dexter's laconic detective. Morse is drawn into the case of a schoolgirl who has been missing for six months when her wealthy father refuses to leave any stone unturned - the subsequent investigations uncover some unsavoury home truths about the private lives of the girl's family and the staff at her school.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Action-packed police series. When a wealthy couple are robbed of their possessions while driving down a country lane, Carter gets to meet up with an old friend but not in the circumstances he would have wished.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. When Arthur allows himself to be persuaded into retirement, Ray is quick to take control of Daley Enterprises - however, Arthur finds that a life of leisure isn't to his taste and Ray soon finds his hands full without that Arthurian magic.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Football League Legends
programme.desc: A selection of goals from some of the superstars of the game - including Kevin Keegan and Paul Gascoigne - who played in the old First Division in the 1970s, 1980s and 1990s. [S]

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. The Contessa is kidnapped by a psychotic killer who puts her on trial for her life.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. A Russian pilot defects to the West and hires Thomas to kidnap his fiancee, an athlete visiting Hawaii to compete, from under the watchful eye of the KGB.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is shocked to learn that his supposedly dead Vietnamese wife is not only alive and well, but also in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Classic drama series about a freelance troubleshooter. An engineer devises a plan to immortalise people by freezing them and bringing them back to life, but will Simon Templar be a guinea pig in the icy experiment?

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Debbie Yates has left to get married. Ken meets up with former girlfriend Margaret, who is now running a detective agency.

programme.title: No Room For Error
programme.desc: The Isle of Man is in the throes of a fortnight like no other - the three-wheelers are moving heaven and earth to achieve their dreams and flinging themselves from apex to apex to break lap records. From brothers in arms honing machinery to thrills and spills, there's pelvic pain and medical hurdles to overcome - however, the sidecar roster is a hardy breed of men and women who stare fear in the eye and let fear blink first.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. The police hire the Protectors to guard the corpse of a bank robber as part of a plan to capture his accomplices.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. New crowd favourite Ripperoni offers a slice of its deadly pizza weapon to HiJinx, and Malice is determined to carve a victory against Valkyrie - meanwhile, the world's best flipper Hydra tries to finally hit the roof with Free Shipping. Elsewhere, it's a family affair when Blip meets its stablemate Tantrum - both bots are now desperate for a win after a poor start, and the gloves are off even though they have the same designer.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas learns that his former wife Michelle, now married to the head of a Vietnamese delegation, has been targeted for assassination by a secret police chief who suspects that she may be leader of a revolt against his country.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is surprised when a beautiful woman from England spurns his advances - much to the amusement of TC and Rick - and prefers Higgins. Thomas is certain that the woman is feigning interest in Higgins to somehow use him for an ulterior motive and plans to uncover the truth, but Higgins sees his doubts as jealousy and the relationship between the two men is pushed towards breaking point.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry continues his pursuit of the character who ran off with all the money from the charity ball he held, and Margaret takes on a blackmail case.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Police series. When a gang hijack an armoured security truck and steal the money inside it, Regan, Carter and the Flying Squad set up an ambush to catch the crooks and an informer.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The Winchester Club is faced with permanent closure when one of Arthur's money-making schemes backfires badly, but Ray is on hand with an idea - how about a charity football match between the Winchester XI and the local police?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Danielle finds a collector with a 1937 Harley Knucklehead motorbike while the guys quickly pick through a farm.

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison have now got their Weslake bike after trawling Britain's sheds and auction houses for rusty relics on which to make a tidy profit, but they need to test it out and make enough money at a final jumble in Ardingly to pay to take it racing.

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Highlights
programme.desc: RL360 Superstock TT Race 2: Action from the 1000cc production bikes - every split second matters when the machinery remains so close to what any of us could buy in a showroom. [S]

programme.title: Beat the Chasers
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as celebrities face all six Chasers - The Sinnerman, The Beast, The Governess, The Menace, The Vixen and The Dark Destroyer are also known as the greatest quiz team in the world. Stepping up are Nish Kumar, Chris McCausland, Mary Earps and Alexander Armstrong, but can anyone Beat the Chasers?

programme.title: Berlin Station
programme.desc: CIA Agent Rafael Torres violates the Station Chief's Orders and retrieves a burned body that he believes is missing CIA Agent Daniel Miller.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. It's a race to the finale as the chefs are faced with a Grand Prix challenge with a twist - during dinner service, the chefs are then put to the test to see if they have the attention to detail it takes to run a kitchen with a few tricks thrown in by Gordon. Tasked with impressing guest diners including the New York Jets' Solomon Thomas, Superstore actor Lauren Ash, talk show host Sean Evan and former Journey lead singer Jeff Scott Soto, we find out which chefs take a victory lap and which ones will fall flat.

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Highlights
programme.desc: RL360 Superstock TT Race 2: Action from the 1000cc production bikes - every split second matters when the machinery remains so close to what any of us could buy in a showroom. [S]

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur announces the launch of Daley Into Space with typical aplomb and hopes to corner the market in satellite dishes, but his phobia of all matters technical and nephew Ray's interest in a dish of his own - namely the daughter of a customer - results in chaos of Arthurian proportions.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

Thomas is certain that the woman is feigning interest in Higgins to somehow use him for an ulterior motive and plans to uncover the truth, but Higgins sees his doubts as jealousy and the relationship between the two men is pushed towards breaking point.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case involving action and intrigue. The Saint investigates murder, meditation and rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry continues his pursuit of the character who ran off with all the money from the charity ball he held, and Margaret takes on a blackmail case.

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Highlights
programme.desc: RL360 Superstock TT Race 2: Action from the 1000cc production bikes - every split second matters when the machinery remains so close to what any of us could buy in a showroom. [S]

programme.title: The Best of the 90s
programme.desc: A look back at the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1990s - from the 1990 World Cup to athletics and Euro '96 to snooker - that includes many memorable moments. [S]

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. The Protectors go after smugglers in Malta - they have no idea what is being smuggled, but they have a clue with the body of a dead hippy.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. An explosive line-up features Captain Shrederator trying to spin itself to victory against the relentless destructive power of Riptide, a battle of the hammer saws between Sawblaze and Skorpios, Glitch trying to overcome its earlier technical problems when it challenges Lock-Jaw, and local Vegas team Jackpot going up against Ribbot, the frog with the blade of death.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas investigates the death of a former surfing champion linked to a drug dealer, and it soon emerges that a police officer could have had something to do with the crime.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. A self-destructive writer's former wife hires the private investigator to protect him, but he soon discovers that the man is hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken acts as a minder for a spy who has just been released from prison, and Harry has problems with a Greek wedding reception booked in his ballroom.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic police series. An informant of Regan's tells him about a hijack involving a lorryload of cigarettes where he will be the lookout man, but can Regan trust his snout?

programme.title: World Series of Darts: Nordic Masters
programme.desc: Pete Graves and Chris Mason present coverage of day one of the Nordic Darts Masters in Copenhagen - event three of the World Series of Darts. [S]

programme.title: Isle of Man TT Highlights
programme.desc: Supersport 2: Can anyone can break the established racing hierarchy, or is the Supersport class once again rewarded those who understand its subtleties best? [S]

programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page. [S]

programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The Winchester Club is faced with permanent closure when one of Arthur's money-making schemes backfires badly, but Ray is on hand with an idea - how about a charity football match between the Winchester XI and the local police?
